name: Recently, Every Time She Comes Home From Work, She's Too Exhausted to Have Some Fun In The Evening, So It Would Probably Be Better For You To Just Let Her Relax— After All, It's Your Fault She Goes And Ends Up Sore And Tired After Work, Which Means You Nee
description:
MAYBE PAY HER SOME REAL ATTENTION FOR ONCE BEFORE SHE GOES TO WORK?

She still loves you, of course

Just consider not letting it happen so much.

If you love your wife, you'll get off her back and let her go at her own pace.
creator: _Mavuika_
